runs.text: Live chat replay is on. Messages that appeared when the stream was live will show up here.

You have the Gemma 4 setup on one DGX spark? How to extend that to a cluster of two DGX Sparks?

https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/bri...

For more on Spark like clustering check out DGX Spark Playbooks →
https://github.com/NVIDIA/dgx-spark-p...
is this gemma4 with webui playbook?
@park8190, I am in the same process two. On these playbooks, most are written for one DGX Spark. So, how do we extend these setup to fully take advantage of two DGX Sparks cluster? Anybody chime?

Also if you're building on/with Spark or Gemma let us know! We'd love to hear the amazing things the community is building.

you could use an orchestrator, or coordinator to read the input and send it to a model depending on complexity of context.
